title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 27th March 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Buy as portfolio hedge and sit tight one month, like a lottery ticket; premium ~500 shows how bearish the market is.
recommendations.detail: Headline hedge call: buy the Nifty 23,000 put (next series) and don't ask in between for a month. By the open, morning buyers were already +Rs 70; trading high around 500-plus premium, which is itself an indicator of how bearish the market is.

recommendations.note: Take the 52,000 put, shut up and sit; all 14 Bank Nifty constituents were negative.
recommendations.detail: If asked, definitely take the Bank Nifty 52,000 put option and sit. Said every stock in the Bank Nifty was in the negative.

recommendations.note: Not falling; fine to hold long-term, can be used.
recommendations.detail: Coal India isn't falling at all; it's fine. Hold 100% for the long term.
Bajaj Finance is fine, can be used; hold for the long term.

recommendations.note: Looks a bit weak; demerger issue pending. Hold with caution.
recommendations.detail: Vedanta looks a bit weak; there's a demerger issue too. Treated as hold-with-caution alongside the decent companies.

recommendations.note: Gave big losses over a year but good developments now; next six months a game changer.
recommendations.detail: Hold; needs patience. Over one year it gave big losses but good developments are happening; next six months going to be a game changer, possibly very good announcements this quarter.

recommendations.note: Good company but rising crude is a negative for tyre companies; hold with patience.
recommendations.detail: JK Tyre is a good company; rising crude prices are a somewhat negative development for all tyre companies. Hold, needs a bit of time and patience.

recommendations.stock: Jagan Sai's IPO (parent company that acquired NewMed, Australia)
recommendations.note: Company on a growth path; good IPO with good allotment chance in this market.
recommendations.detail: On a growth path; acquired the NewMed company in Australia and going ahead with those plans, funding part via the IPO. A good IPO in this market with good allotment chance. Apply for it; no problem.

recommendations.note: Exit on rallies; not worth a single rupee until you recover the loss.
recommendations.detail: Exit Ola on rallies; even any small rally is not worth even a single rupee until you recover from the loss.
JPL/JTL Infra too — exit on rallies.
Shakti Pumps is one to hold.

recommendations.note: Already bought long-duration; market swings 1,000+ pts/week, just wait, no point rethinking now.
recommendations.detail: Long-duration option lots (6-9 months) now trade actively. He already bought for all those months at ~Rs 100 (now ~Rs 21,000 loss); market swing is over 1,000 points week-to-week, so just wait, no point rethinking from now.

recommendations.note: A better bet in a sell-off; e.g. DSP equal-weight portfolios, for slightly reasonable returns.
recommendations.detail: In this sell-off, the Nifty Top 10 Equal Weight Index is a better bet; there are a couple of equal-weight index portfolios (e.g. in DSP) — sticking to that gives signs of slightly reasonable returns.
